concerns.text: FR-001 (and all subsequent FRs) reference “US-1” (e.g., “(See US-1)”), but the specification only defines “User Story 1” without an explicit US‑1 identifier. The cross‑reference is therefore unresolved, breaking traceability.
FR-004 cites “US-2” while the document only contains “User Story 2”. The missing US‑2 identifier makes the requirement unanchored.
FR-007 cites “US-3” but no US‑3 identifier exists; only “User Story 3” is present. This creates an undefined reference.

Inconsistent terminology: the narrative uses “User Story 1/2/3” whereas functional requirements use the shorthand “US‑1/US‑2/US‑3”. This instability can cause confusion and hinders automated traceability.
